name: Descope MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official Descope MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Descope's authentication platform — managing users, sessions, access keys, flows, and integrating Descope's no-code authentication journeys into agent-driven identity workflows.
use_cases: Managing user accounts and authentication flows from identity agents
Querying user session data from security monitoring agents
Creating and revoking access keys from credential management agents
Auditing authentication events from security compliance agents
Configuring SSO connections from enterprise integration agents
Managing tenant and user permissions from access control agents
not_for: Teams using Auth0, Okta, Clerk, or another auth provider
End-user authentication (Descope provides SDK for that)
best_when: An agent needs to manage authentication flows, users, or access keys in a Descope-powered identity system.
avoid_when: You're using Auth0, Okta, Clerk, or another authentication platform.

auth.notes: Descope management keys for admin API access. Project ID required alongside management key. No scope granularity — full project access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: up to 7,500 monthly active users
pricing.notes: Generous free tier (7,500 MAU). Per-MAU pricing. Enterprise for high-volume or compliance requirements. MCP server is open source sample.

known_agent_gotchas: Project ID required alongside management key for all API calls
Management key has no scope granularity — full project read/write
User IDs are Descope-internal — not user-provided external IDs
Flow management uses visual editor in console — programmatic flow creation is limited
MCP server is a sample app, not a production-hardened official server
Rate limits not well documented — monitor closely in production
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Management key lacks scopes — broad access. SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA. Passkeys and MFA supported for end users.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Management key lacks scopes. SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA.
